description_long: This is a rustic wooden cabin with a rectangular footprint, featuring a prominent gable roof covered in overlapping shingle tiles and supported by exposed wooden beams. The front facade includes a covered porch with wooden railings and steps, flanked by a pair of crates and a stone well. The exterior walls are constructed from horizontal wooden planks, while the foundation and some structural elements are made of stone blocks. There are several rectangular windows with wooden frames distributed along the longer sides, and two exterior doors: one at the front opening onto the porch and one at the rear. The roof is adorned with decorative wooden crossbeams and a small stone chimney, adding to the traditional, hand-built appearance.
description: A rustic wooden cabin with a gable shingle roof, stone foundation, front porch, and multiple windows and doors. Decorative beams and a stone chimney enhance its traditional look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, front steps, crates, and stone well, with the gable roof and decorative crossbeams visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying two rectangular windows, the stone foundation, and the shingled roof with exposed beams.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back door, stone foundation, and the continuation of the gable roof and crossbeams.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with two windows and a partial view of the porch, showing the stone chimney and roof structure.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with overlapping shingle tiles, exposed wooden beams, and decorative crossbeams
attribute_window_arrangement: Four rectangular windows, two on each long side, symmetrically spaced and of medium size, with wooden frames
attribute_door_placement: Two exterior doors: one centered on the front facade opening onto the porch, and one centered on the rear facade
